title: AI Student (Work Integrated Learning Project)
description: Designing and training a computer vision segmentation model in Python (TensorFlow/OpenCV) to detect hairline cracks on metallic surfaces, targeting 80%+ classification accuracy and 85%+ F1-score. Engineering a deterministic preprocessing pipeline to eliminate metallic glare and environmental noise, improving model reliability in real-world industrial environments. Curating and annotating a 500+ image dataset, implementing Git-based CI/CD workflows, and supporting integration with an industrial IoT deployment platform for production testing.

title: Coding Instructor
description: Teach programming fundamentals, logic, and debugging to 30+ students through hands-on game development projects. Design structured coding exercises that reinforce algorithms, computational thinking, and software development best practices. Mentor students in project-based environments, strengthening communication and technical leadership skills.

title: Data Analyst (Co-op)
description: Analyzed complex financial datasets using SQL, Excel, and Power BI to uncover performance trends and support executive decision-making. Built automated Power BI dashboards for real-time KPI monitoring, reducing manual reporting workload and improving reporting efficiency by 20%. Improved data integrity across HR, Finance, and IT systems (including SAP integration), reducing reporting discrepancies by 15%.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Developed predictive machine learning models in Python to forecast energy demand and customer behavior, enhancing operational planning accuracy. Built interactive dashboards in Power BI and Tableau to visualize KPIs and business metrics for leadership teams. Automated recurring reporting pipelines using Python and SQL, reducing manual processing time by 20% while increasing reporting reliability.
